allow: Bash(node -e "const { HDate } = require\('@hebcal/core'\); const d = new HDate\(new Date\(2024, 0, 15\)\); console.log\('hebrew:', d.toString\(\), 'getDate:', d.getDate\(\), 'getMonth:', d.getMonth\(\), 'getFullYear:', d.getFullYear\(\), 'greg:', d.greg\(\).toISOString\(\)\); const next = new HDate\(d.getDate\(\), d.getMonth\(\), d.getFullYear\(\)+1\); console.log\('next year same hebrew date:', next.toString\(\), 'greg:', next.greg\(\).toISOString\(\)\);")
